claims.summary: A generated heartbeat is not necessarily an admitted or enqueued heartbeat.
claims.disposition: Verified current enqueue evidence distinguishes admitted, enqueued, and channel-closed outcomes.

claims.summary: Heartbeat texture continuity needs comparison with the previous generated feature.
claims.disposition: Verified prior-feature delta, cosine, and texture context are already recorded; route felt sufficiency to Concordance.

claims.summary: Dynamic heartbeat intensity would alter autonomous control.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait for cadence, intensity, admission, or scheduling changes.
